steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The question asks to emphasize the location, meaning the sentence should make Deer Isle, Maine the focal point of the main idea, not just background detail.

steps.title: Apply the signal
steps.content: Choice A makes the location the necessary destination—to see the school, you must travel to Deer Isle, Maine. This places location at the logical center of the sentence's point. B and D omit the location entirely; C mentions it only incidentally. That matches choice A — A is correct.
